name: claude-universal-custom-proxy
description: Local Anthropic Messages gateway that routes Claude-style model names to free models on Ollama Cloud, Hugging Face Inference Router, and NVIDIA NIM (with optional DeepSeek, Moonshot/Kimi, Z.AI/GLM, Xiaomi MiMo, OpenAI, Gemini, Qwen, Anthropic upstreams) and a smart Claude family fallback. Educational project.
